name: Dick Durbin
subject: Need you with me in the fight, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Now that the August recess is over and the Senate is back in session, the American people are counting on us to fight for their families and their communities on everything from passing commonsense gun safety reforms to addressing the urgent threat posed by climate change.
**[I need you with me in these fights and so many more. Contribute $5 right now.](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-back-in-session?refcode=em190909&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
There is a long list of crucial issues facing our nation and the Senate must work to find solutions--everything from protecting access to affordable health care, to securing our elections from foreign interference, to ending the Trump Administration's cruel, anti-immigrant agenda.
It's time for the Senate to work for the American people. I'll be fighting as hard as I can to overcome Mitch McConnell's obstruction and defeat President Trump's agenda, but I can only do it with help from supporters like you, Peter.
**[Contribute $5 right now if you're standing with me in the critical battles ahead.](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-back-in-session?refcode=em190909&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-back-in-session?refcode=em190909&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c35/42ab3cf4/61cdfec0/135d780d/2955270736/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c35/42ab3cf4/61cdfec0/135d780e/2955270736/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Team Yang
subject: Before the debate on Thursday:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Would you tell us your thoughts today so we can pass them along to Andrew before the debate? | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=226%2E377263%2EDvTwdU) Friend -- On Thursday, Andrew will take the stage for the Democratic debate in Houston -- the biggest moment of this campaign so far. But before he goes up there and makes us all proud, we want to hear what issues are most important to you and what you’d like him to share up on the stage. **Would you tell us your thoughts so we can pass them along to Andrew before the debate? We’re running a truly grassroots campaign -- that means we can’t do this without your help.** [Take our pre-debate survey before midnight so we can share your thoughts with Andrew. We will compile the results tomorrow, so make sure to get your response in now.](https://act.yang2020.com/survey/email-predebate-survey-20190909?source=email-20190909PM-all&t=2&akid=226%2E377263%2EDvTwdU) | [Take the Survey](https://act.yang2020.com/survey/email-predebate-survey-20190909?source=email-20190909PM-all&t=3&akid=226%2E377263%2EDvTwdU)

name: Joe Sestak
subject: "He shows up everywhere"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
The **Philadelphia Inquirer profiled me ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804607/97554489/1864525972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&emci=b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798))** and covered my **grassroots campaign in Iowa** \- which is **now also expanding to New Hampshire**. "'**Every time I turned around he was at the same event,' said Bret Niles, Linn County Democratic chair. 'He shows up everywhere**...' The grassroots approach [has gotten some traction](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804608/97554503/-1902359365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&emci=b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798) — the Iowa Starting line called the campaign '[peculiar and surprisingly effective.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804609/97554521/2128061837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&emci=b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798)' The [National Review ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804610/97554522/-1828110372?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&emci=b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798)said Sestak is 'the most Interesting Democrat You Forgot Was Running.' Both publications laud Sestak’s campaigns-of-old feel, not to mention the hustle — three or four events a day. Being on the move is kind of Sestak’s calling card. This is the same man [who walked across Pennsylvania during his 2016 Senate run](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804611/97554523/182612271?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&emci=b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798). He’s just swapped the flight jacket [and sneakers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804613/97554525/1101867287?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&emci=b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798) for dress shirts and loafers."
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804615/97554533/641078767?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&emci=b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798&fbclid=IwAR2sJ_ZEujz5H-mza27FhhjSrLwAwUqJ4JTqTjeUd3giP49_Nl06qbDm1Qg)**
The piece quotes Sean Bagniewski, chair of the Polk County Democratic Party (the biggest county party in Iowa), as saying: "**He’s got a guerrilla campaign... It’s kind of the traditional, good old-fashioned way to win the caucuses.** "
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804617/97554535/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&refcode=em09082019nh)**
The piece goes on to describe my on-the-ground strategy: "**His goal is to hit as many counties as he can — including often overlooked rural areas — as many times as possible. He estimates he’s been in 50. “Amateurs do tactics, experts do logistics," Sestak often says."**
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804619/97554537/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&refcode=em09082019nh)**
The Inquirer's Julia Terruso talks about some of the appeal of my candidacy, saying of me that "he’s also quick to argue he has some of the **best foreign affairs know-how in the field**. And he’s a moderate who has not been afraid to buck his party, something that could **appeal to disenchanted Republicans**."
**If you believe in our grassroots campaign and think my experience and message of accountability to people is what we need in a nominee and in a President, please contribute to my campaign.**
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804621/97554539/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&refcode=em09082019nh)
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9804623/97554541/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&emci=b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b97cf308-4ed3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349/5a9982c7-b1d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk5ODJjNy1iMWQzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XkakQ6skBvA4qRM9ZkoWUQU8fQyclNjoSPO0txyGTG8=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: Mike Siegel
subject: Summer is winding down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9810112/97612826/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZjMDcwZi1kM2QzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UskGqaqe6XGvRzq3GbFskj9NY7aAQSKBl5_sPoaWNIs=&emci=ba6c070f-d3d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=bb6c070f-d3d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, Summer is winding down. The temperature may still be hot, but we are hard at work knocking on doors, making calls, and reaching voters across the Texas 10th. With everyone wrapping up summer vacations, going back to school, and getting back to work, we are ready to harness the excitement and flip this district. Last election, we activated over 1,000 volunteers — wow! We need your help to make sure we can do that—and more—in 2020. [**Can I count on you to fuel our campaign as we ramp up our voter outreach?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9810113/97612827/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZjMDcwZi1kM2QzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UskGqaqe6XGvRzq3GbFskj9NY7aAQSKBl5_sPoaWNIs=&refcode=em090919)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9810114/97612828/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZjMDcwZi1kM2QzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UskGqaqe6XGvRzq3GbFskj9NY7aAQSKBl5_sPoaWNIs=&refcode=em090919) We have a lot to accomplish to build a movement that will change this district. People are ready to get active and fight back against Trump’s regressive agenda. clean_body: Peter, Summer is winding down. The temperature may still be hot, but we are hard at work knocking on doors, making calls, and reaching voters across the Texas 10th. With everyone wrapping up summer vacations, going back to school, and getting back to work, we are ready to harness the excitement and flip this district. Last election, we activated over 1,000 volunteers — wow! We need your help to make sure we can do that—and more—in 2020. We have a lot to accomplish to build a movement that will change this district. People are ready to get active and fight back against Trump’s regressive agenda. Our campaign is dedicated to giving every single person an outlet to change their government for the better — and that takes money. We need your support to help hire on field staff, print literature, and fund our top-of-the-line technology to power our grassroots volunteer campaign! name: Mark
subject: I'd love to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It's not too late to give your input on which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington next week.
|
---
| | Derek,

A few days ago, I asked you to take my fall survey and let me know which issues the Senate should prioritize when we return to Washington this week. [**If you haven 't had a chance to take it yet, it's not too late to give your input.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d11c/53d9897e/52b811e5/1c8e347b/582160960/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-stratresend")

My team showed me the results so far, and your top issues were pretty clear. You want:
* To **secure our elections** from future foreign interference
* Progress on bipartisan, common-sense **gun safety laws**

I'm right there with you, Derek. Our nation is hurting in the wake of one mass shooting after another, and candidly, enough is enough. There are a number of common-sense gun safety reforms that Americans from across the political spectrum actually agree on. It's only the special interests and politicians like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell who are standing in the way of bipartisan action to make our communities safer.

I'm also incredibly alarmed that our elections remain vulnerable to foreign interference. This is an issue I've been fighting hard on, despite Republican obstruction in the Senate. Still, we're making headway and gradually winning the bipartisan support we need to get this done before the 2020 elections.

These are two areas where we need action immediately, and I'm planning to keep up the fight in the Senate. But right now, I want to know what issue matters to you the most. **[Derek, if you haven't taken my fall survey yet, will you weigh in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d11c/53d9897e/52b811e5/1c8e347b/582160960/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-stratresend")**

Thanks,
Mark **** **** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d11c/53d9897e/52b811e5/1c8e347a/582160960/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20190910db__214__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")******
---
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

**Begin forwarded message:**

It’s past time for Congress to address the opioid epidemic.

68,000 people died last year from opioids. I’ve met with families who have had loved ones die at the hands of this epidemic — **so this is personal for me.**

That’s why earlier this year, I helped introduce legislation that would combat the import of Fentanyl made in China, which would save lives.

name: [2] Our Revolution Team
subject: a pathetic attempt to stop progressives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| The enemies of grassroots organizing are mobilizing. Again.

The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee - following the lead of establishment House Democrats - is blacklisting vendors who are working to elect progressives to the US Senate.

[_**Add your name here to stand against this direct attack against progressive Democrats from the corporate establishment. We will be delivering these signatures to the DSCC.**_](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://ourrev.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-against-the-senate-blacklist-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+to+stand+against+this&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1")

We need to send **Chuck Schumer** a strong message - We won't allow you and the establishment to rig primary elections with desperate and discriminatory blacklists. **[STOP THE BLACKLIST](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://ourrev.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-against-the-senate-blacklist-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+STOP+THE+BLACKLIST&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1")**
* * *
The Corporate wing of the Democratic party just escalated their attacks on progressives by expanding the blacklist to the Senate as well.

That means candidates who believe in addressing climate change, getting big money out of politics and ensuring that health care is a human right are being kneecapped by the establishment.

[**_Sign here to stand against the corporate wing 's desperate attempt to blacklist progressives and kneecap our growing grassroots movement:_**](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://ourrev.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-against-the-senate-blacklist-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+Sign+here+to+stand+against+the+corporate&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1") **[STOP THE BLACKLIST](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://ourrev.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-against-the-senate-blacklist-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+STOP+THE+BLACKLIST&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1")** We are dead serious about our mission to get big money out of politics, restore a democracy of the people, and pass bold progressive legislation like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal.

_That 's why it's so important that we elect real progressives to help President Sanders in the Senate._

We will not back down in the face of the establishment's pathetic attempts to stop voters from electing senators who represent what's good for the American people, not multinational corporations.

**Stand against the Senate Blacklist** : [**_https://go.ourrevolution.com/Senate-Blacklist_**](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "http://ourrev.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-against-the-senate-blacklist-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=5+-+httpsgoourrevolutioncomSenateBlacklist&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1")

Onward,

The whole team at Our Revolution

PS: We will be delivering these signatures directly to the DSCC to show them that our grassroots movement is far stronger than their increasingly desperate political games.

---
* * *

[Support Our Revolution ->](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/footer-2019?amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+Support+Our+Revolution+rarr&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190910_1_1")

"" "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Join our Campaign Kickoff
body:
On September 27th from 6pm to 8pm at the Monticello Community Center | |
---
| | |
#### Ready to get Ian Todd elected in 2020?
# Join our Campaign Kickoff!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Join Ian Todd as he kicks off his campaign for U.S. Congress in Minnesota's 6th Congressional District. Food will be provided. The event is free, but donations are always welcome.

September 27th, 6pm-8pm

Monticello Community Center - Warehouse Room
505 Walnut St
Monticello, MN 55362
---
| | "Last November, we broke records and brought our district closer to victory than we've been in six years. I've been absolutely blown away by the support you have all given me and continue to give. When I ran in 2018, I did so because I believed I could make a positive change in the world. This time, I'm running because all of you believe I can make that change.

I'll be honest, running for Congress is not what I expected to be doing with my life after active duty service in the Air Force. I'm by no means a typical candidate, but like you, I am a typical American.

I've lived through financial hardship, I had parents that struggled to get by while raising me, and I understand what living paycheck to paycheck feels like. That's exactly why I'm running. There's something truly wrong in our country if someone who has lived through such mundane and common troubles is considered atypical as a representative. We deserve someone who understands the struggle, someone who will represent us over the lobbyists.

Take it from a veteran, there's something powerful about knowing you're in service to something bigger than yourself. With your help, we CAN win in 2020 and bring those changes we believe in!" -Ian Todd
---
|

---
|

name: Addisu Demissie, Cory 2020
subject: Wanna help with debate prep?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Cory and I have been busy making sure he's ready for the big day on Thursday. We've been reviewing the responses from supporters like you on what issues he should focus on -- but we need your help. Cory wants to hear from you, team: **What issues do you want to hear about at the debate?** Here's the link to our brand new debate prep survey: [**https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Debate-Feedback**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Debate-feedback?source=em_su_20190910_AD_20190910-su-AD-debatesurveybump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") This team is the best,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Wow, team! We received so many responses to our debate prep survey -- thank you to everyone who took the time to share their insight with me and my team. I'm still going through all of your input, but here are some of my favorites so far: _" A lot of people don't want to see Donald Trump win a second term. But focus on what you are for rather than what you are against." \- Terry, California_ _" All 2020 Democratic Presidential candidates can join forces to collectively denounce the current administration and its supporters." \- Mark, Georgia_ _" Never be afraid to speak the truth and be a voice for the oppressed, whether or not they have a vote." \- Camille, Florida_ [**Now, I have a new question for you: What are the issues that you think should be front of mind at the debate? Take two minutes to fill out my official debate survey here.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Debate-feedback?source=em_su_20190910_AD_20190910-su-AD-debatesurveybump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") As always, thanks for your help.
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Debate-feedback?source=em_su_20190910_AD_20190910-su-AD-debatesurveybump-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b07/5fca0d19/752baeba/2919d1cb/1162448876/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b07/5fca0d19/752baeba/2919d1ca/1162448876/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b07/5fca0d19/752baeba/2919d1c9/1162448876/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b07/5fca0d19/752baeba/2919d1c8/1162448876/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b07/5fca0d19/752baeba/2919d1cc/1162448876/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Huge deadline coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Our public report will be under the microscope. Reporters and pundits are going to read these topline numbers as a sign of the strength of our campaign.
#
I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important.
We have a huge official FEC deadline coming up. We’ll have to publicly report everything we raised through September. [So can I count on you to make your first donation today before our deadline?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33085?refcode=ema20190910-54309&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=54309%2E444211%2E-93zLR)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33085?refcode=ema20190910-54309&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=54309%2E444211%2E-93zLR)**
The donations we collect aren’t just numbers on a spreadsheet. Each and every contribution is a statement of support for everything we believe in — from taking on climate change, to stopping gun violence and ending family separations.
But we know our public report will be under the microscope. Political pundits are going to read the topline numbers as a sign of the strength of our campaign. I want to show them our momentum is growing. Your donation helps us do that.
**[Can you add your first contribution now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33085?refcode=ema20190910-54309&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=54309%2E444211%2E-93zLR)**
Thanks for being in this with us.
Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=54309%2E444211%2E-93zLR). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

subject: We can't walk away from the table, friend [personal message]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
A personal message from John Hickenlooper, Candidate for U.S. Senate, Geologist, and Former Governor of Colorado:
---
| | [](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannouncesplit_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1") Friend, Democrats will have a hard time accomplishing anything if Mitch McConnell is still controlling the Senate in 2020. **If we're going to flip the Senate and put an end to Mitch McConnell's obstruction, we need to win in Colorado.** Cory Gardner is out of step with Colorado and the progressive, pragmatic policies we've enacted -- **He has voted with Trump 98% of the time.** But we have Trump, Gardner, and McConnell shaking in their boots because they know Colorado is ready for change -- recent polls have shown our campaign leading Gardner's by double digits. [**Will you keep up our momentum by making a contribution to support my campaign and 314 's Senate Battleground Fund? >>**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannouncesplit_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+keep+up+our+momentum+by+making+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1") | | | [Chip in $10 ->](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannouncesplit_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1&amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+10+rarr&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190910_HickSurrogateUpdate_U2_X1")

As Governor of Colorado, I worked to expand access to health care, implement universal background checks for gun purchases, and combat climate change. **I intend to fight for these same priorities in the Senate.**
Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Cory Gardner will be able to take advantage of millions of dollars from Corporate PACs and special interests like the NRA -- But I have an army of grassroots supporters like you backing me up.

| Stand with John Hickenlooper for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
---

clean_body: A personal message from John Hickenlooper, Candidate for U.S. Senate, Geologist, and Former Governor of Colorado: | | "" Friend, Democrats will have a hard time accomplishing anything if Mitch McConnell is still controlling the Senate in 2020. If we're going to flip the Senate and put an end to Mitch McConnell's obstruction, we need to win in Colorado. Cory Gardner is out of step with Colorado and the progressive, pragmatic policies we've enacted -- He has voted with Trump 98% of the time. But we have Trump, Gardner, and McConnell shaking in their boots because they know Colorado is ready for change -- recent polls have shown our campaign leading Gardner's by double digits. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" As Governor of Colorado, I worked to expand access to health care, implement universal background checks for gun purchases, and combat climate change. I intend to fight for these same priorities in the Senate. Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Cory Gardner will be able to take advantage of millions of dollars from Corporate PACs and special interests like the NRA -- But I have an army of grassroots supporters like you backing me up. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Together, we can win Colorado, take the Senate back from Mitch McConnell and change Washington. name: Kevin Lata
subject: Hi there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
I want to take a moment to introduce myself | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
Hey team,

I want to take a moment to introduce myself: **I 'm Kevin, Margaret Good's Campaign Manager.**

For the past 6 weeks, we've been laying the foundation needed to flip this ultra-competitive district and put Margaret on a path to victory. In order to win, the next 14 months of this campaign will be dedicated to:
* Building a broad-based grassroots coalition of community leaders, faith organizations, constituency groups, the business community, and civic and issue-based groups to understand the issues that matter most to voters in this district and then running a campaign that's driven by their values and priorities.
* Mobilizing our vast support base to register thousands and thousands of voters in every single corner of the district.
* Organizing a robust voter contact operation led by hundreds of volunteers who will knock on thousands of doors and have face-to-face conversations with voters all across the district, from Osprey and Lakewood Ranch to Bradenton, Ruskin and Fish Hawk.
* Producing and then delivering compelling digital media content to voters' phones, tablets, and computers. Our ads will tell the story of who Margaret is, what she stands for, and why she will be a great member of Congress.
* Running TV ads in the country's 11th most expensive media market against the nation's 6th wealthiest member of Congress. We'll show the stark contrast between how our current representative has actively worked against our interests and how Margaret is going to help create the change we need.
* And most importantly -- putting up yard signs on every block and every street corner in the district.

**But we can 't do any of this alone. If we're going to build a true grassroots movement for change, it's going to take all of us stepping up and investing whatever you can into Margaret, our campaign, and our bold plan to create real change in people's lives. **

[**That 's why I'm asking you today, team: Can you support Margaret's campaign with a donation of any size?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Express Donate $15 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?express_lane=true&amount=15&em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all=express_lane_15)
---
[Express Donate $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?express_lane=true&amount=25&em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all=express_lane_25)
[Express Donate $50 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?express_lane=true&amount=50&em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all=express_lane_50)
[Express Donate $100 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?express_lane=true&amount=100&em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all=express_lane_100)
[Or, a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

I've never met anyone that's as fiercely intelligent, relentlessly hardworking, and who fights as hard for people as Margaret. When she asked me to be her campaign manager again, saying yes was one of the easiest decisions I've ever made.

We have demanding goals and a big task on our hands, so our staff puts in long hours every day. We do it because when elected, Margaret will make serious, fundamental change in people's lives and in Washington. And that is exhilarating to think about.

She's been a champion for the elderly, a powerful defender of our public education system, and a staunch advocate for combating climate change. As a Congresswoman, she's going to work day in and day out to lower prescription drug prices, tackle our nation's environmental crisis, and ensure women's reproductive freedom.

There's nothing more important I could be doing with my life than working to get Margaret elected.

**She 'll fight hard for my family and yours in Congress -- let's show Margaret we're ready to fight for her as well. **

[**If you can, please contribute today to bolster our winning campaign and allow us to ramp up our efforts to elect representation that puts our priorities first in Washington. We can 't do this without you! >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

********[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---

Thank you again for helping us build our movement. Your generosity and support are appreciated by Margaret, me, and everyone working on the ground!

_Kevin Lata_
Campaign Manager
Margaret Good for Congress

********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/GHms6ZRz6yKhrtTlRsAm2COYfaTRtZNXKtxhRHhZzLI=/7NYCRSKAmRzI_P7bUaTkYy2fOP1ri0pON6lu62DYMv4=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins has voted to confirm almost ALL of Trump's extremist right-wing judicial nominees.
body:
No more.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0a/4bef7a87/68d3ffa9/287f0684/4100381354/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Susan Collins has voted to confirm almost all of Trump 's extremist right-wing judicial nominees. No more. **
[**Chip in $3 now to support Sara Gideon 's campaign for U.S. Senate.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0a/4bef7a87/68d3ffa9/287f069b/4100381354/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190910-2-full")
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0a/4bef7a87/68d3ffa9/287f069b/4100381354/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190910-2-full")****
Friend,
Since his inauguration, Trump has confirmed a record-breaking 43 appeals court judges, 99 district court judges, and 2 Supreme Court judges.
But what stands out isn't just the number - it's how extreme they are.
We're talking about people like Judge John Bush, who compared abortion to the enslavement of African-Americans.
Or Judge Neomi Rao, who blamed women for being the victims of date rape, saying "a good way to avoid a potential date rape is to stay reasonably sober."
**Dozens and dozens of similarly outrageous judges have been confirmed over the past two years. And Susan Collins has voted for almost ALL of them.**
It's easy to focus on the big names like Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh. The Supreme Court has a lot of power, and we should absolutely be concerned about the direction our highest court is swinging.
But we all have to remember - the Supreme Court decides about 100 cases each year. Appeals court judges resolve around _50,000._
These appointments might not get a lot of attention, but they couldn't be more important. Putting the right people on the bench - at all levels - is how we protect our voting rights, advance fair district maps, and defend a woman's right to choose.
**That 's why we need a Senator like Sara Gideon, who will vote against extremist right-wing judges. If you agree: **
[**Make a $3 donation to support Sara 's campaign today. Our campaign isn't taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation goes a very long way. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0a/4bef7a87/68d3ffa9/287f069b/4100381354/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190910-2-full")
These judicial positions are lifetime appointments, so Trump's appointees will be making decisions that affect millions of people for _generations._ It's critical that we don't let them tighten their hold over our courts of law.
Thanks for reading,
Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0a/4bef7a87/68d3ffa9/287f069b/4100381354/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190910-2-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0a/4bef7a87/68d3ffa9/287f069a/4100381354/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0a/4bef7a87/68d3ffa9/287f0699/4100381354/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

body:
"As Congress reconvenes this week, we’ll have a choice to make — stand by an outdated, 25-year-old North American Free Trade Agreement, or vote to..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f30b60b05&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **USMCA is a Needed Upgrade from NAFTA. Let’s Get it Passed.**

“As Congress reconvenes this week, we’ll have a choice to make — stand by an outdated, 25-year-old North American Free Trade Agreement, or vote to pass the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement, a modern trade agreement that will create thousands of new American jobs,” Sen. Rob Portman (R-OH) writes in _The Washington Post_.

“Democrats should be leading the charge for its passage, because they have long criticized NAFTA, and because the USMCA addresses the major concerns they have raised with NAFTA,” he adds. “That’s why, if Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.) were to bring USMCA to the House floor for a vote, I am confident it would pass.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a6db5cbc8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “American farmers and ranchers are the most productive in the world, and consumers in other countries are always wanting American products,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes in the [_Redwood Falls Gazette_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5e5ca62391&e=3ee4985eea). “President Trump has made it his mission to support American agriculture and negotiate better trade deals, so our productive farmers can sell their bounty around the globe . . . Title by title, verse by verse, USMCA improves virtually every component of the old NAFTA.”
---
|
---
| “Nationwide, more than 2 million American manufacturing workers across 43,000 small and medium-sized businesses depend on access to the Canadian and Mexican markets for economic success,” Rep. Vicky Hartzler (R-MO) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0bfbc4cf7a&e=3ee4985eea). USMCA “will ultimately deliver an additional $2.2 billion in economic activity within the United States, adding more than 176,000 new jobs to our economy.”
---
|
---
| “At the end of last month, 14 House Democrats sent a letter to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, urging her to allow USMCA a vote by the end of the year,” writes Christopher Henney, CEO of the Ohio AgriBusiness Association, in [_The Columbus Dispatch_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e794c90bd&e=3ee4985eea) _. "_ These members represent varied states across the nation, showing how vital this deal is for all Americans."
---
|
---
| “Move over, Village People. You've got some unexpected competition. A group of U.S growers calling themselves the Farming People have released a parody of the band's disco-era ‘YMCA’ that urges members of a gridlocked Congress including House Speaker Nancy Pelosi to pass the ‘USMCA,’” Julia Limitone writes in [**Fox Business**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5182f942e6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Our Friends and Neighbors: Casualties of the Trade War
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdscj [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdscj]

Peter,

Today in the Sioux City Journal, I told the story of my family friend, Tommy. Click here to read our op-ed about his story and how to solve problems facing Iowa’s farmers. [https://siouxcityjournal.com/opinion/columnists/tuesday-topic-iowa-farmers-are-caught-in-crossfire-of-trump/article_8bdceb45-9330-528d-bea2-228c6eda0857.html?emci=49161f17-f0d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=9765739&fbclid=IwAR1OXAIUnrITgbiJc5xLeVktLUcGYqpixdetGiduNAGdvinpO3Ltch3jjFI]

For over one hundred years, Tommy’s family farm has been passed down from generation to generation.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdscj [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdscj]

And with each generation came a new set of challenges. Usually, their worries were the weather, paying the bills, and getting the best pew on Sunday mornings. But these days, bigger concerns are creeping in: trade, the cost of inputs, and low commodity prices.

On September 1st, President Trump ramped up his trade war and imposed new tariffs on China. As the country’s second largest agricultural exporting state, Iowa stands to lose a lot: the prices of soybeans and pork have crashed, and now that we’re shut out from our markets, farm bankruptcies are rising as farm incomes plummet.

Families that have passed down farms for generations are now forced to work off the farm or to abandon their livelihoods altogether and move out of the community in hopes of making a living in another profession in a more thriving economy. Our community cannot afford the drain of losing more folks like Tommy. What our government needs to do is invest in places like rural Iowa and in people like him.

Click here to read our op-ed. [https://siouxcityjournal.com/opinion/columnists/tuesday-topic-iowa-farmers-are-caught-in-crossfire-of-trump/article_8bdceb45-9330-528d-bea2-228c6eda0857.html?emci=49161f17-f0d3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=9765739&fbclid=IwAR1OXAIUnrITgbiJc5xLeVktLUcGYqpixdetGiduNAGdvinpO3Ltch3jjFI] It’s going to take all of us coming together to defeat Steve King and ensure our farmers have a strong voice in Washington.

Standing Tall For All,
J.D. Scholten

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdscj [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdscj]
Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

name: Andrea
subject: what will it take?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
What will it take, folks?

Tim and I are sick about this. How many lives have to be lost -- how many communities shattered -- how many _families_ destroyed before Mitch McConnell and the Senate muster up the moral courage to take real action against gun violence?

[TAKE ACTION WITH ME](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d37/5486deaa/3eb899fd/dc82fa6/3116182464/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/common-sense-reform-now?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+TAKE+ACTION+WITH+ME&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190910_1_3&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190910_1_3&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190910_1_3")
Gun violence is this country's most relentless disease, and offering thoughts and prayers is not enough. At a time like this, when the resolve and strength of our country is being tested, we must demand that Mitch McConnell and the Senate put the safety of Americans above their ties to the gun lobby and pass common-sense gun reforms once and for all.

We must stand together to find real solutions to address this tragic epidemic. [**Will you join us in this fight?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d37/5486deaa/3eb899fd/dc82fa9/3116182464/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/common-sense-reform-now?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+join+us+in+this+fight&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190910_1_3&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190910_1_3&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190910_1_3")

We need you with us. Our lives are on the line -- our _children 's_ lives are on the line.

Thank you,

Andrea

|
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: HRC and ECU just endorsed in Minnesota >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
From cosponsoring the Equality Act to fighting corruption, I've always been a champion for moving our country in the right direction. My newest endorsements reflect that.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190910endo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

BIG NEWS: We just earned two big endorsements.

The Human Rights Campaign, which advocates for LGBTQ+ equality, and End Citizens United, which aims to get big money out of politics, have both endorsed me for re-election in 2020.

I am a strong believer in equal rights and protections for everyone and that our democracy should work for all of us, which is why I'm thrilled to receive the support of both of these organizations. **These endorsements highlight a few key issues that I 've been working hard on in the Senate, and I'm proud to have their support in my fight to stay there.**

**[Are you with me like HRC and End Citizens United are? Just a week after I joined the Senate, I cosponsored the Equality Act, which prohibits discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans because every person deserves to be treated with dignity and respect. And I'm a cosponsor of the Democracy for All Act, which would overturn Citizens United because our democracy is about the power of the people -- NOT dark money.

I'm proud to be a champion for moving our country in the right direction -- one where people are prioritized over special interests. And I've always been and always will be dedicated to creating an equal playing field for all Minnesotans.

These big endorsements prove that we've got the momentum on our side to win this race and stop Jason Lewis, Mitch McConnell, and their anti-equality, anti-democracy agenda.

**We're on the path to victory -- I hope you 'll help us keep the momentum going! **

**[Chip in now.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190910endo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks for your help,

Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. name: Markey Campaign HQ
subject: Keep it rolling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

Did you see the latest big news about Ed's campaign? The endorsements keep rolling in!

✅Elizabeth Warren is standing with Ed, along with 73% of the Massachusetts state legislature.

✅ Progressive organizations like NARAL, LCV Action Fund, the Sunrise Movement, 350 Massachusetts, and more are standing with Ed.

✅ And just this weekend, Ed was endorsed unanimously by AFSCME Council 93, which represents 30,000 local and state government employees.

Support for Ed is broad, diverse, deep, and growing!

**[Please: Pitch in $27 now and show you stand with Ed for our FEC reporting goal!](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091019_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
This month, it's crucial that we show the massive grassroots support behind Ed as well. The Federal Election Commission reporting deadline is on September 30, and Ed's fundraising numbers will go public.

Those numbers need to reflect strong support Ed has to fight for our values in the Senate.

_**[That's why we've set a monster goal of $50,000 this month to help Ed win. name: They did what? via Voter Protection Project
subject: How the GOP is suppressing its own voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Republicans are putting Donald Trump before democracy: Arizona Nevada, Kansas, and South Carolina are planning to cancel their 2020 presidential primaries to prevent all registered Republicans from voting for ANYONE who isn't Donald Trump. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Republicans are putting Donald Trump before democracy: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06dd/72412298/41f05203/6102b3e6/1458684935/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/gop_cancelling_primaries?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1") Nevada, Kansas, and South Carolina are also planning to cancel their 2020 presidential primaries to **prevent all registered Republicans from voting for ANYONE who isn 't Donald Trump.** **Peter -- cancelling elections is straight from the playbook of authoritarian regimes. We can 't allow this to happen.** **[Sign our emergency petition to condemn the GOP for its voter suppression efforts>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06dd/72412298/41f05203/6102b3e9/1458684935/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/gop_cancelling_primaries?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Sign+our+emergency+petition+to+condemn+t&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1")** | | | [Add your name ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06dd/72412298/41f05203/6102b3e8/1458684935/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/gop_cancelling_primaries?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1")
---
The GOP is SO committed to voter suppression and to keeping Donald Trump in power no matter what that they're willing to strip voting rights from their own voters --
And with THREE Republicans already committed to challenging Trump in 2020, it's clear they're terrified of ANY internal disagreement.
**[Add your e-Signature to stand against this dangerous power grab>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06dd/72412298/41f05203/6102b3eb/1458684935/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/gop_cancelling_primaries?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+eSignature+to+stand+against+thi&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1")**
| | [Sign on ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06dd/72412298/41f05203/6102b3ea/1458684935/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/gop_cancelling_primaries?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Sign+on+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1")
---
This is a slippery slope to the GOP dismantling our democracy -- and we can't allow it to happen.
\-- VPP

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06dd/72412298/41f05203/6102b3ed/1458684935/VEsA/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190910_GOPprimaries_U1_X1")

body:
---
| | 3 critical pieces of news just broke. FIRST: _TIME_ just reported Trump's campaign is "flushed with cash" and spending millions to turn blue states red. THEN: Trump announced he's personally traveling to New Mexico for a MASSIVE rally to defeat Democrats like Ben Ray. NOW: [_**Ben Ray 's launching a huge response to fight back, win his Senate race, and keep his state BLUE. He needs 749 gifts before midnight to make Trump's rally backfire. Will you rush $13? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b8/18e32a7f/52c1b3fe/7be70655/2253439363/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190910_em_fr_b1_dav_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") We need to show up for Ben Ray now more than ever before. We can't let Trump swoop in with piles of cash, steal this state from our Democrats, and sabotage our entire shot to win the Senate. Will you take a stand with $13 before midnight? ** ** | | ****[**Chip in $13 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b8/18e32a7f/52c1b3fe/7be7064a/2253439363/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190910_em_fr_b1_dav_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=13")****

Team Ben Ray

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b8/18e32a7f/52c1b3fe/7be7064e/2253439363/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b8/18e32a7f/52c1b3fe/7be7064f/2253439363/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b8/18e32a7f/52c1b3fe/7be7064c/2253439363/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b8/18e32a7f/52c1b3fe/7be7064d/2253439363/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b8/18e32a7f/52c1b3fe/7be70642/2253439363/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b8/18e32a7f/52c1b3fe/7be70643/2253439363/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

>
This deadline is especially important because our fundraising numbers from the past three months will be released to the public. And we want to show the country that our movement is strong and ready for big, structural change.

But keeping this campaign 100% grassroots-funded means we're running this campaign differently -- that means no private fundraisers, no calls made to big donors, and no donations from fossil fuel or health care executives.

Our movement grows one $5, $10, or $15 contribution at a time -- and with your help, we can get back on track and power this campaign in the weeks and months ahead.

**Let's show the country that you don't need to take money from special interest groups or hold private fundraisers to grow a grassroots movement nationwide.**

[**Chip in today to help our campaign get back on track toward hitting our end-of-quarter goal.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529ddc/45c30650/13274b323/6689a0f3/2993878170/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUoyOUZfRUdSX1NIT19UXzIwMTkwOTEwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ29F_EGR_SHO_T_20190910_V1S2_P")

body:
The countdown starts now. Pitch in whatever you can and help us reach 10,000 contributions by debate night. | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0) Friend -- We know that the Yang Gang likes a challenge -- and we know that you are the most dedicated supporters in this race. So we’re setting a new goal that will show everyone watching just how strong this team is. **With the Houston debate just two days away, we're trying to hit 10,000 contributions before Andrew takes the stage Thursday night.** [The countdown starts now. Pitch in whatever you can and help us reach 10,000 contributions by debate night:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7227?t=2&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7228?t=3&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7229?t=4&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7230?t=5&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0)

---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7232?t=7&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7233?t=8&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0)
---
Let’s be honest. Despite rising polls and increased support, many people in the media and the establishment are not giving Andrew the attention he deserves.
**If we hit this goal, we can do a couple important things: We can show everyone the strength of this movement we’re building together and we can send a powerful message that we are here to stay -- and win.**
Now this goal is big -- and it will be difficult to hit. But if everyone gives it everything they have, we can hit it.
Are you in? Pitch in now:
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7228?t=9&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0)

---
Thanks for everything you are doing to build this movement,
Team Yang
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7234?t=15&akid=232%2E377263%2EDtHhc0)

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Let’s be honest. Despite rising polls and increased support, many people in the media and the establishment are not giving Andrew the attention he deserves. If we hit this goal, we can do a couple important things: We can show everyone the strength of this movement we’re building together and we can send a powerful message that we are here to stay -- and win. Now this goal is big -- and it will be difficult to hit. But if everyone gives it everything they have, we can hit it. Are you in? Pitch in now: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thanks for everything you are doing to build this movement, Team Yang Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement. |

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's presidency is a danger to people's health -- LITERALLY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, For the first time since 2009 (the year before the Affordable Care Act was passed), the number of Americans without health insurance coverage has risen. According to the Census Bureau, the number of uninsured Americans rose by 2 million in 2018, bringing the total to 8.5 percent of the population. The Census Bureau credits this increase to the drop in the number of people who qualify for public programs such as Medicaid \-- which so happens to be one of Trump's favorite targets for budget cuts. His draconian healthcare policies now put millions of Americans at risk because they aren't able to afford basic healthcare. Democratic candidates like Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren have proposed bold single-payer, Medicare-for-all plans that eliminate private health insurance and create universal coverage. Voters are split on the issue, so we want to hear from YOU: **Do you support universal healthcare?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd71/6e9863e8/14891fda/1db0c59f/1714627268/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ic3YpPXIE") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd71/6e9863e8/14891fda/1db0c59f/1714627268/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ic3YpPXIE") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd71/6e9863e8/14891fda/1db0c59c/1714627268/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190910b.ND-b&refcode2=YuAc2C0UTbTPHOS0z3HL")
---
|

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

Washington, DC 20003

name: Margaret Good
subject: Kevin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
Making sure you saw this |
Hey team --

I hope you had a moment to read this note from my campaign manager, Kevin -- I'm so excited to have him on board! He's a force of nature and an incredible addition to Team Good. He has a clear vision to guide us to victory in 2020 and we're working hard every day to enact it!

Kevin is absolutely right that we have got a lot to do if we're going to take down one of Florida's most entrenched politicians and bring real change to Washington and our district.

With 149 precincts in our district, campaigning is a daily exercise of listening, organizing, and perseverance. I'm asking for your help. Donate to our campaign and invest in the real change we're fighting to make.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq32019?190910**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

Unlike our opponent, we're building a true grassroots movement -- we need all the help we can get! Every contribution helps. Your support makes a meaningful impact on our campaign!

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq32019?190910**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

Thanks so much!

_\-- Margaret_

P.S. You'll be hearing more from Kevin about important race updates as our campaign progresses, so feel free to add him to your email contacts to stay in-the-know!

\-----forwarded message-----
From: **Kevin Lata**
Date: Tue, Sep 10 at 3:25 PM
Subject: Hi there
---
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
Hey team,

I want to take a moment to introduce myself: **I 'm Kevin, Margaret Good's Campaign Manager.**

For the past 6 weeks, we've been laying the foundation needed to flip this ultra-competitive district and put Margaret on a path to victory. In order to win, the next 14 months of this campaign will be dedicated to:
* Building a broad-based grassroots coalition of community leaders, faith organizations, constituency groups, the business community, and civic and issue-based groups to understand the issues that matter most to voters in this district and then running a campaign that's driven by their values and priorities.
* Mobilizing our vast support base to register thousands and thousands of voters in every single corner of the district.
* Organizing a robust voter contact operation led by hundreds of volunteers who will knock on thousands of doors and have face-to-face conversations with voters all across the district, from Osprey and Lakewood Ranch to Bradenton, Ruskin and Fish Hawk.
* Producing and then delivering compelling digital media content to voters' phones, tablets, and computers. Our ads will tell the story of who Margaret is, what she stands for, and why she will be a great member of Congress.
* Running TV ads in the country's 11th most expensive media market against the nation's 6th wealthiest member of Congress. We'll show the stark contrast between how our current representative has actively worked against our interests and how Margaret is going to help create the change we need.
* And most importantly -- putting up yard signs on every block and every street corner in the district.

**But we can 't do any of this alone. If we're going to build a true grassroots movement for change, it's going to take all of us stepping up and investing whatever you can into Margaret, our campaign, and our bold plan to create real change in people's lives. **

[**That 's why I'm asking you today, team: Can you support Margaret's campaign with a donation of any size?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Express Donate $15 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?express_lane=true&amount=15&em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all=express_lane_15)
---
[Express Donate $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?express_lane=true&amount=25&em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all=express_lane_25)
[Express Donate $50 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?express_lane=true&amount=50&em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all=express_lane_50)
[Express Donate $100 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?express_lane=true&amount=100&em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all=express_lane_100)
[Or, a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

I've never met anyone that's as fiercely intelligent, relentlessly hardworking, and who fights as hard for people as Margaret. When she asked me to be her campaign manager again, saying yes was one of the easiest decisions I've ever made.

We have demanding goals and a big task on our hands, so our staff puts in long hours every day. We do it because when elected, Margaret will make serious, fundamental change in people's lives and in Washington. And that is exhilarating to think about.

She's been a champion for the elderly, a powerful defender of our public education system, and a staunch advocate for combating climate change. As a Congresswoman, she's going to work day in and day out to lower prescription drug prices, tackle our nation's environmental crisis, and ensure women's reproductive freedom.

There's nothing more important I could be doing with my life than working to get Margaret elected.

**She 'll fight hard for my family and yours in Congress -- let's show Margaret we're ready to fight for her as well. **

[**If you can, please contribute today to bolster our winning campaign and allow us to ramp up our efforts to elect representation that puts our priorities first in Washington. We can 't do this without you! >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

********[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---

Thank you again for helping us build our movement. Your generosity and support are appreciated by Margaret, me, and everyone working on the ground!

_Kevin Lata_
Campaign Manager
Margaret Good for Congress

********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9RX2_QLp30Qgw_WrS_bBBmQIsH7ohLmgs2Bntu9bgTk=/rp0rMrb-xXDW7SS1VGKR2cLuPm8zU6RLYkicICuCXoQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.10_b2_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---
Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
---

Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota FL 34277 United States
