name: Cory Booker
subject: re: Tom Steyer on the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, a few days ago it was announced that Tom Steyer officially qualified for the October debate stage. He announced his candidacy just a few months ago and since then, he's spent over $10 million of his own money to fund his campaign. The truth is, I don't have billions of dollars in personal wealth. I rely on grassroots donations of $3, $5, and $20 from people like you to power this campaign. **And just last week, we fell short of what we needed to raise in order to stay on pace for fundraising this month.** [**We 've already fallen short once this month and cannot afford to do it again. Before the debate Thursday, can you chip in to get us back on track?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190910_CB_20190910-fr-CB-TS-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom leapfrogged over a dozen candidates and it's now looking like the October debate will be held on two nights. I'll be honest that's going to be hard to compete with. When we miss goals or fall short of what we need to raise daily, it slows us down and frankly, that isn't an option when you have a billionaire in the race. It's why I'm asking for your help to make sure we have all the resources we need to hire field organizers, open campaign offices, and even run local ads to spread our campaign message. [**We're already falling behind for this month and need to make up ground before the debate on Thursday. Donate right now to get us back on track >>**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190910_CB_20190910-fr-CB-TS-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
Cory
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b00/5fca0d19/7559b3d7/291e228f/2283760121/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b00/5fca0d19/7559b3d7/291e228d/2283760121/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b00/5fca0d19/7559b3d7/291e228a/2283760121/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b00/5fca0d19/7559b3d7/291e2297/2283760121/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b00/5fca0d19/7559b3d7/291e2294/2283760121/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b00/5fca0d19/7559b3d7/291e228f/2283760121/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Conole HQ
subject: The climate crisis should be bigger than politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | Donald Trump and Congressman Katko supported the United States withdrawing from the Paris Climate Agreement despite the overwhelming scientific evidence that we're facing a climate crisis.

**[Add your name here to demand that Katko and Trump stop ignoring science and start taking steps to combat climate change!](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+to+demand+that+Katko+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2")

_On Monday, September 9, 2019, Francis Conole wrote:_** [**Add your name here to demand that Donald Trump and John Katko start doing something to fix our climate crisis!**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+here+to+demand+that+Donald&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2") [TAKE ACTION](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+TAKE+ACTION&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2")

* * *
July was the hottest month on record in the history of planet earth and the science confirming the severity of our climate crisis grows ever-more alarming.

That's why President Trump's decision to withdraw the U.S. from the Paris Agreement -- a global effort to fight climate change -- was such an enormous failure. Trump and Katko's opposition to needed action to address the climate crisis puts present and future generations of Central New Yorkers at risk.

[**Demand that Trump and Katko take action to address the climate crisis!**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Demand+that+Trump+and+Katko+take+action+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2")

I'm running for Congress because I will not sit here silently while Katko and Trump hurt Americans and endanger our future. Even the Pentagon, where I previously served as a policy advisor, called climate change a threat to our national security.

We're already seeing the effects of climate change here in Central New York -- like the harmful algal bloom in Skaneateles Lake, which serves as a source of drinking water for Syracuse.

[**The U.S. must rejoin the Paris Agreement and address the climate crisis. Add your name here if you agree.**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/climate-crisis?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+The+US+must+rejoin+the+Paris+Agreement+a&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_30DO_190910_1_2")

Yours in Service,

Francis

"" On Monday, September 9, 2019, Francis Conole wrote: "" "" July was the hottest month on record in the history of planet earth and the science confirming the severity of our climate crisis grows ever-more alarming. That's why President Trump's decision to withdraw the U.S. from the Paris Agreement -- a global effort to fight climate change -- was such an enormous failure. Trump and Katko's opposition to needed action to address the climate crisis puts present and future generations of Central New Yorkers at risk. "" I'm running for Congress because I will not sit here silently while Katko and Trump hurt Americans and endanger our future. Even the Pentagon, where I previously served as a policy advisor, called climate change a threat to our national security. We're already seeing the effects of climate change here in Central New York -- like the harmful algal bloom in Skaneateles Lake, which serves as a source of drinking water for Syracuse. "" Yours in Service, Francis P.S. Thank you so much to everyone who contributed to our Fight Back Fund last month. We hit our fundraising goal and I know it's because of your support! | ---|---|--- |

| | Peter,

Yesterday we rolled out our new ad, "Lights Out," highlighting Matt Bevin's devastating cuts to public education and attacks on teachers.

Well, Matt Bevin didn't like it one bit (bullies never like being challenged) and held an unhinged, erratic press conference to try to deflect blame for his own failed record.

**[You can watch the ad here and while you're at it, will you chip in $10 so we can make sure Kentuckians know about Bevin's real record on public education?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a94/ad6dc73/1433b006/db472de/2425157455/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-lights?refcode=20190910nd__249__&amount=10")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Liz=20Wahl?=
subject: El Paso Strong
body:
| | | |
---
| **Hi, my name is Liz Wahl. I am running as Democratic candidate for Texas’ 23rd District.** **This District has taken on particular importance after the Republican incumbent announced his retirement from Congress. So not only is Texas-23 a swing district - it’s officially swing blue.** **I am writing to you from El Paso. Just a few weeks ago a white-supremacist killed nearly two dozen innocent lives in this community. The shooter was inspired by the racist rhetoric of an unhinged president.**** **

Visiting the memorial in El Paso made me sad and angry, but inspired. Sad for the victims in another senseless mass shooting. Angry at elected leaders for doing nothing. But inspired by this wonderfully diverse community coming together to become stronger.

The daughter of an immigrant, I know what it’s like for someone to yell racist slurs at a parent. It makes you feel uncomfortable in your own skin. Back then I reasoned bigots were rare. Today, they’re emboldened and inspired by the words of our own president. It is a phenomenon I have covered extensively as a journalist.

It is clear that words have consequences - sometimes deadly ones. We have an epidemic of gun violence in this country and something needs to be done about it. I, like many other Democrats, will not be bought off or intimidated by the NRA. We will stand up for the interests of our citizens. **It’s enough. It’s time for action. For common sense policies: Background checks, red flag laws, and to stop the sale of weapons of war. 2020 MUST be the year that we take concrete steps to end the gun epidemic.

It’s not just a unique time for this district. It’s a historically critical time for our state, our country, our democracy. Please help me be a fresh voice in Washington ready to enact change. [Please contribute what you can. ](https://twitter.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=004218d27cababe4c94f00355&id=5c25a2e339&e=c901a073c7)

Together, we can make the future brighter and safer.

All the Best,

Liz Wahl**

---

body:
NBC news reports...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0f/4bef7a87/68abcde9/287f07bb/3535858980/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

_\- NBC News_**
[**Make a $3 contribution so we can defeat Susan Collins, win in Maine, and take back the Senate!**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0f/4bef7a87/68abcde9/287f07ba/3535858980/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTAtMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190910-3-full")

Friends,
If Democrats are going to take back the Senate in 2020, we have to win in these three states:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0f/4bef7a87/68abcde9/287f07ba/3535858980/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTAtMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190910-3-full")
_(NBC News)_
And we can do it! Susan Collins' approval rating is down _44 points_ since 2017, the biggest drop of anyone in the Senate. She's more vulnerable than ever.
Don't be fooled, this race will still be _extremely_ tough. Susan Collins is a 22-year incumbent with countless big money donors and special interests backing her campaign, not to mention the entire Washington Republican establishment.
**But with this incredible grassroots team behind us, we can win this race, flip the Senate, and elect a leader who puts Mainers first.**
So what do you say? Will you help us do it?
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign today. We aren 't taking any money from corporate PACs, so every individual donation makes a big difference. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c0f/4bef7a87/68abcde9/287f07ba/3535858980/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTAtMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190910-3-full")
Thanks for your support. Now let's do this.
\- Team Sara

* * *

Stand With Mark Kelly is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55.
For 2020, we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating Trump and turning Arizona blue. We recruited astronaut Mark Kelly to run for Arizona's US Senate seat, are working to win a key Arizona Congressional seat and to flip both houses of the Arizona State Legislature.

body:
you have to see what The Economist is saying! | | | [**Friends, the DNC claims their arbitrary rules foster a well-rounded debate. This headline shows they 're wrong:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafe4/134673f2/b58c514/69963d2f/2178275028/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The DNC's arbitrary rules blocked Michael from the September debate, but his initiatives pack a serious punch:

* Achieving universal health coverage with a plan he unveiled YEARS ago
* Investments in the 70% of Americans who don't hold a college degree
* Ensuring free preschool to fight inequality in our education system
* Eroding childhood poverty by 40%

These are big, progressive ideas.

[**More importantly, they 're policies that Michael has championed for his entire career.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafe4/134673f2/b58c514/69963d2f/2178275028/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Weld
subject: you’re fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDAIOVWjWFsi1JF8nhja9DY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190910&n=1) Team — Amidst Trump’s false claims about Hurricane Dorian’s path, and his subsequent attempts to prove that he was correct, it looks like — according to _the New York Times_ — Secretary of Commerce Wilbur Ross threatened to fire experts to stop folks from discrediting Trump’s erroneous statement. After Trump tweeted out falsely that Dorian was headed towards Alabama, the National Weather Service office in Birmingham sent a tweet correcting the record and contradicting the president. According to the reporting, **_this led Secretary Ross to threaten to fire scientists in charge of providing Americans, our government, and first responders with accurate forecasts of natural disasters._** This politicization of science, fact, and truth has got to stop. We can not have the president and his henchmen interfering with the work of subject matter experts, **_especially when people’s lives are on the line._** These childish games have real-world consequences, they impact how states and localities prepare for disasters, and impact the faith Americans have in their government. This is just another example of what is at stake in 2020, and another reason why we need our movement to succeed in next year’s election. But if we want to make President Trump a one-term president, **we’re going to need your help.** [**Can you chip in $20.20 right now to show President Trump and Secretary Ross that you’re sick and tired of them playing political games with the truth?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDAIOVWjWFsi1JF8nhja9DY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190910&n=2) — Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDAIOVWjWFsi1JF8nhja9DY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190910&n=3)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump takes a Sharpie to NOAA -- and to our trust in science
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump's now-infamous Sharpie-scribbling on a NOAA map to try to prove his false claim that Hurricane Dorian posed a threat to Alabama was apparently just the tip of the iceberg in this scandal. It has now been revealed that NOAA staff \-- the people who provide accurate and life-saving weather predictions for our country \-- have been warned not to contradict the president if he makes any future statements about the weather. This means that if Trump tweets out a false claim about a dangerous storm, air-quality condition, or threat to the public, NOAA scientists won't be able to correct it and protect the public without fear of retaliation or firing. We should be able to trust our national scientists. They provide incalculably valuable predictions that directly impact many of the industries that drive our economy. We shouldn't have to second-guess our weather reports or worry that we aren't getting the full picture \-- we should be able to trust our scientists and know that they're always allowed to tell the truth. Trump and the GOP don't just want us to distrust science; they want us to feel like we can't trust anything and only they can save us. They've demonized and attacked the media, our elections, our elected officials, and even our own neighbors. We've got less than 14 months until the next election, and we know they're going to be spending that entire time creating more distrust. We can stop them, but we've got to organize now, talk to voters, and back candidates who want to build this country, and its people, up \-- and that's going to take all of us. [**Every dollar you give will go toward getting Democrats ready and energized to vote come Election Day 2020. Can you help us out with a donation of just $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd73/6e9863e8/1482d12e/1db0c460/681461578/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190910c.ND&refcode2=kvEpXbMKhIHuJCqllWjp") When Democrats stand up, we win. Thank you so much, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd73/6e9863e8/1482d12e/1db0c467/681461578/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190910c.ND&refcode2=kvEpXbMKhIHuJCqllWjp")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s message to Historically Black Colleges and Universities
body:
For over 180 years, America’s Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs) have made extraordinary contributions to our country. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=66313ac0a6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 10, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s message to Historically Black Colleges and Universities**

**For over 180 years,** America’s Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs) have made extraordinary contributions to our country, helping bring the American Dream to millions of African-American students and many others.

**Today, President Donald J. Trump** addressed the 2019 National HBCU Week Conference, where he pledged to keep building on his Administration’s work in support of these important institutions. “Together, we will ensure that HBCUs continue to thrive and prosper and flourish for the countless generations to come,” he said.

**President Trump:**[We’re finally fighting for OUR forgotten communities!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d2b4de2ff&e=3ee4985eea)

**The success of HBCUs** was a priority for the Trump Administration from day one. Barely a month after taking office, President Trump signed an Executive Order to move the Federal HBCU initiative back into the White House. From there, he made sure that agencies across his Administration were developing plans to enhance their support for HBCUs.

**President Trump** also secured and signed legislation that added more than $100 million for scholarships, research, and centers of excellence at HBCU land grant institutions.

**Lifting up forgotten communities** across America is the single most important agenda item for President Trump. Last week’s jobs report, for example, revealed that the African-American unemployment rate is now at its lowest level _ever_ recorded. And new economic census data, released today, shows that America’s poverty rate just hit its lowest level since 2001.

**A bunch of policies** helped make that happen: pro-growth tax cuts, regulatory reform, new trade deals, and so on. But one creative idea that doesn’t get enough attention is President Trump’s creation of “Opportunity Zones.” Part of the 2017 tax cuts law, Opportunity Zones drive capital investment into distressed communities across the country with tax incentives for long-term commitments. The result is a projected $100 billion in new investments across 9,000 such communities.

**HBCUs have a crucial role** to play in this revival of the American Dream**.** “You have shaped American leaders, trained American legends, pioneered American innovations, empowered American workers, built American communities, and you've made all of America very proud of you and the job you've done,” President Trump said today. “My administration is determined to fight for you.”

[By the numbers: African-American unemployment rate hits new all-time low.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3baaf14784&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:**[How President Trump is lifting up America’s forgotten communities](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75e9326e27&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **In photos: Ivanka Trump’s push for apprenticeships**

**Advisor to the President****Ivanka Trump** traveled to Alabama today to meet with students from the Robotics Tech Park, a state-of-the-art manufacturing training facility. While there, she announced that the apprenticeship program—part of Toyota’s Federation for Advanced Manufacturing Education (FAME)—will be expanded across the country.

**“The Administration** is committed to ensuring inclusive growth and opportunity in our booming economy by creating pathways for all Americans, regardless of age or background,” Ms. Trump said. “I applaud the Toyota Motor Company and Manufacturing Institute for expanding the FAME program, which will build upon the economic successes we’ve had in the manufacturing industry.”

**The Alabama “success story”** under President Trump is remarkable, Ms. Trump tweeted. Since Election Day 2016, the state’s unemployment rate has reached an all-time low of 3.3 percent. In that time, more than 500,000 manufacturing jobs have been added, compared to 7,000 lost in 2016. “We’re just getting started,” [she wrote](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=070d0f50e0&e=3ee4985eea).

**Today’s visit** comes as part of President Trump’s Pledge to America’s Workers, a nationwide effort to get private-sector companies to commit to better training and reskilling opportunities for our country’s great workforce.

[In photos: Ivanka Trump visits Alabama. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc7f0d7c04&e=3ee4985eea)

**See the President’s Pledge:** [Over 12 million opportunities—and climbing!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd2e21413e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo Shealah Craighead
| **President Trump listens as Executive Director of the White House Opportunity & Revitalization Council Scott Turner delivers remarks at the 2019 National Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCU) Conference** | September 10, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b8c727ac2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=36b5f540dc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0012999d80)
---

---
